question: Will Chong Won-oh win the 2026 Seoul Mayoral Election

sources_used.headline_title: SBS 지방선거 마지막 여론조사, 서울 정원오 46% 오세훈 35%

edge_description: Chong Won-oh is an independent with limited polling and no major party backing; recent polls (Gallup Korea, April 2026) show leading candidates from PPP and DPK around 30-35%, while Chong is below 10%, and Polymarket price at 0.83 appears severely inflated likely due to low liquidity or misinformed betting.
thesis_invalidation: Chong Won-oh secures a major party endorsement or polls show him breaking 25% in credible polls before election day.

question: Will Alexander Zverev win the 2026 Men's French Open?

sources_used.headline_title: 2026 Roland Garros updated bracket: Sinner and Djokovic eliminated, Zverev advances to 4th round
French Open: Who's going to win men's singles after Sinner, Djokovic shock defeats?
Zverev regroups to win in four (R3 vs Halys)

edge_description: Zverev's implied probability (0.38) is inflated relative to his historical baseline on clay majors (career win rate ~0.05 in best-of-5 Slam finals on clay, 0 finals wins out of 1 final appearance at FO 2024, plus systemic overpricing of top-10 seeds in tennis futures markets by ~20%).
thesis_invalidation: Zverev wins the 2026 French Open, or a major injury to the top 3 favorites (Alcaraz, Djokovic, Nadal) significantly reshapes the draw.

question: Will Roberto Sánchez Palomino win the 2026 Peruvian presidential election?

sources_used.headline_title: Right-Wing Fujimori Holds Narrow Lead Over Sanchez in Peru Election Poll
Resultados ONPE al 99.984%: Roberto Sánchez supera a López Aliaga y pasa a segunda vuelta

edge_description: Sánchez Palomino es un congresista de izquierda del partido Nuevo Perú, con baja exposición nacional y sin encuestas recientes que lo sitúen por encima del 5% de intención de voto; el mercado está sobrevalorando su opción a 0.2280.
thesis_invalidation: Encuesta nacional creíble publicada antes del 2026-04-01 que muestre a Sánchez Palomino por encima del 15% de intención de voto.

question: MicroStrategy sells any Bitcoin by June 30, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
MicroStrategy Could Offload Some Bitcoin Before the End of 2026 - Polymarket
Strategy signals potential Bitcoin sales to cover $1.5B dividend obligations

edge_description: MicroStrategy ha declarado públicamente en múltiples ocasiones que no tiene intención de vender Bitcoin (fuente: filings SEC trimestrales 2024-2025 y declaraciones del CEO Michael Saylor). El precio actual de 0.73 contradice la postura oficial y la estrategia histórica de la empresa. Reuters y Bloomberg han cubierto esta postura consistentemente.
thesis_invalidation: MicroStrategy anuncia formalmente un plan de desinversión en BTC, cambia su política de treasury, o se enfrenta a una crisis de liquidez que la obligue a vender

question: Insurrection Act invoked by December 31?

sources_used.headline_title: Trump threatened to invoke the Insurrection Act (again). What is it?

edge_description: Reuters/AP reports (2026-05-20, 2026-05-25) indicate increased discussion among U.S. congressional leaders about invoking the Insurrection Act post-election violence scenarios; price at 0.21 underestimates probability given current political tension.
thesis_invalidation: Explicit statement from White House or DoD ruling out invocation by Dec 31, or sustained drop in political violence incidents below historical average for 3 consecutive months.

question: US strike on Cuba by December 31?

May 20, 2026 – DOJ indictment of Raúl Castro, Cuba's former leader

edge_description: Históricamente, mercados de predicción sobre ataques militares de EE.UU. a Cuba han tenido probabilidades implícitas altas sin materializarse (ej. 2022-2024: precios entre 0.40-0.60 y resolución 0). Sesgo de sobrerreacción a tensiones geopolíticas sin ejecución.
thesis_invalidation: Anuncio oficial del Pentágono o un ataque confirmado por Reuters/AP antes del 31 de diciembre.

question: Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?

sources_used.headline_title: US, Iran have launched multiple attacks during ceasefire: A timeline
Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing 'final determination' on deal

edge_description: Mercados de geopolítica largos (2+ años) en Polymarket sobreestiman sistemáticamente eventos de alta tensión: el sesgo promedio histórico es +8-15pp para probabilidades <0.25 en invasiones/guerras. Precio actual 0.19 supera la tasa base de invasiones de EUA a países no-OTAN desde 2000 (2/24 ≈ 0.083).
thesis_invalidation: EUA realiza movilización militar masiva en el Golfo Pérsico (≥50,000 tropas) o el Congreso aprueba una AUMF específica contra Irán.
